specs.title: cp-000: Manual-entry authors placeholder is John Smith Jane Doe
cp-001: Manual-entry journal placeholder is N Engl J Med
cp-002: Manual-entry year placeholder is 2024
cp-003: Manual-entry volume placeholder is 389
cp-004: Manual-entry issue placeholder is 4
cp-005: Manual-entry pages placeholder is 312-320
cp-006: Manual-entry DOI placeholder is 101056NEJMoa
cp-007: Manual-entry Save Reference button is disabled until the title contains non-whit
cp-008: Manual entry splits authors on commas first then interprets the last token as fa
cp-009: Manual entry falls back to reference title Untitled when the title field is empt
cp-010: Manual entry parses year with parseInt and falls back to 0 when parsing fails
cp-011: Manual save generates ids in the form ref_timestamp_random
cp-012: After manual save the manual form resets all fields back to empty values and typ
cp-013: After manual save the dialog returns to the search tab
cp-014: When selected references exist the footer heading reads Selected n
cp-015: Selected-reference pills show first author family name plus year
cp-016: Removing a selected-reference pill leaves the dialog open and only updates selec
cp-017: Footer primary action label is Insert Citation
cp-018: Footer primary action is hidden entirely when no references are selected
cp-019: Reference-sidebar header title is References
cp-020: Reference-sidebar count pill shows the total referencessize
cp-021: Header plus button title is Add reference
cp-022: Header sort trigger title is Sort
cp-023: Header close button has no visible label text and closes the sidebar immediately
cp-024: Sort menu options are By citation By author By year and By date added
cp-025: Sort mode defaults to number
cp-026: Sort menu closes immediately after choosing a new sort option
cp-027: The sidebar does not register a document-level outside-click listener to close t
cp-028: Filter input placeholder is Filter references
cp-029: Empty sidebar state headline text is No references yet
cp-030: Empty sidebar action text is Add your first reference
cp-031: References are split into cited and uncited groups using referenceNumberMaphasre
cp-032: The uncited group header label is Not cited n
cp-033: Uncited rows render with reduced opacity
cp-034: Collapsed cited rows show numeric badges like 4
